Ontario Made

Indiana Limestone · Natural Stone Fabrication

The same stone as the
Empire State Building.

Indiana Limestone has been prized for over 1,000+ years for its workability, durability, and capacity to hold crisp architectural detail. The same geological formation supplied stone for the Empire State Building, the National Cathedral, and the Biltmore Estate. Now available for your project, fabricated right here in Ontario.

1,000+ Years trusted
100% Natural stone
Ontario Made certified

Our Specialties

Two Crafts. One Standard.

Indiana Limestone fabrication and concrete precast — each produced with the same commitment to precision, permanence, and considered design.

Natural Stone

Limestone Products

Columns, balusters, veneers, pavers, carving, and more. Custom shop drawings for every specification.

→ Concrete

Precast Products

Residential, commercial, and industrial precast elements built precisely to specification.

→ Full Service

Custom Services

GFRC panels, landscaping, fireplace design, 3D wall art, sculpturing, and complete design services.

→ Materials

Colours & Finishes

Fifteen Indiana Limestone colours plus six veneer types. Request physical samples.

→
Now Available

Glass Fiber Reinforced Concrete

Lightweight, high-strength GFRC panels for architectural facades, feature walls, fireplace surrounds, and custom sculptural elements. Up to 75% lighter than standard precast — with unlimited design flexibility.

Explore GFRC →

Our Products

Built for Permanence.

Every piece fabricated to your exact specification. Standard profiles and fully custom work available.

Limestone · Architectural

Columns

Handcrafted Indiana Limestone columns in Doric, Ionic, Corinthian, Tuscan, and Composite styles. Custom specifications for every project, crafted with great artistry and precision.

View Details →

Limestone · Architectural

Balusters & Balustrades

Solid limestone balusters for entryways, balconies, staircases, and pool areas. Visually consistent colour and form throughout your entire project.

View Details →

Limestone · Cladding

Veneers

Thin and full bed depth Indiana Limestone veneers in smooth, split face, and tumbled finishes. No footing required for thin veneer — installs over existing masonry.

View Details →

Limestone · Hardscape

Pavers

Timeless beauty and exceptional durability for outdoor spaces. Low maintenance, long-lasting, available in a variety of colours, cuts, and textures.

View Details →

Limestone · Finishing

Wall Caps

An elegant finished look for any masonry wall. Cost-effective protection in six standard profiles — Classic, Rounded, Double Wash, Bull Nose, Vintage, and Natural Rockface.

View Details →

Limestone · Artisan

Carving

Custom limestone carving expertise — from intricate architectural ornaments to full sculptural commissions. The stone that holds crisp detail better than any other.

View Details →
View All Limestone Products →

Why Tulip

Design-Led Stone Fabrication.

01

Expertise

Indiana Limestone and Precast specialists with deep material knowledge. We work directly with architects, contractors, and homeowners to bring every specification to life exactly as envisioned.

02

Process

Custom shop drawings and CNC precision. Our drafting team collaborates closely with your architect to address every detail — eliminating jobsite issues before fabrication begins.

03

Result

Standard and fully custom solutions, trusted on luxury residences across Canada & USA. Ontario Made. Built to endure for generations — not just for today.

View Full Portfolio →
Our Craft

Where stone meets
artisanship.

Every piece we fabricate carries the weight of generations of stonemasonry tradition. Indiana Limestone, shaped by hand, finished with precision — the same natural stone used in the Empire State Building, the National Cathedral, and the Biltmore Estate. Now available for your home.

Based in Brampton, Ontario, we fabricate limestone and precast elements for homeowners, architects, and contractors across Canada & USA. Every project is approached as if it will stand for generations — because it will.

Our Story →

Client Stories

Built on Trust.

“
The craftsmanship on our limestone columns exceeded every expectation. The team was meticulous with the shop drawings and kept us informed throughout fabrication. The finished result is exactly what we envisioned.

M. Stefanovic

Residential — Oakville, ON

“
We have specified Tulip's limestone products on three projects now. Their ability to match existing stone and accommodate custom profiles is unmatched in Canada & USA. A reliable partner for any architect working with natural stone.

D. Marchetti, Architect

Commercial — Toronto, ON

“
Our balustrades and paver terrace have transformed the property entirely. Visitors always ask who did the stonework. The quality of the material and the installation speaks for itself every single day.

J. Harrison

Residential — Richmond Hill, ON

Our Process

Six Steps to Your Stone.

From first contact to final delivery — here is exactly what to expect.

01

Contact

Email office@tulipprecast.com or call 647-534-7755 to discuss your project.

02

Estimate

Submit project details to our estimator for accurate pricing.

03

Shop Drawings

Our drafting team collaborates with your architect or contractor on every detail.

04

Approval

Drawings forwarded for approval. Phone confirmation required on return.

05

Fabrication

Upon signed proposal and deposit, your project enters our schedule.

06

Delivery

Custom limestone or precast elements delivered to site, ready for installation.

Ontario Made Certified

Fabricated Locally. Built to Last.

Every product is fabricated right here in Ontario. Choosing Tulip means investing in local craftsmanship, local jobs, and a supply chain you can trust from raw material to finished stone.

Ready to start your project?

Send us your drawings, concepts, or inspiration. Our team will guide you from design to delivery.
